parameters.text:
⏳ Analyse en cours... / Analysis in progress...

🔍 Extraction des données / Data extraction
🤖 Interrogation de l'IA / AI processing
📊 Génération des graphiques / Chart generation

_15-30 secondes / seconds..._

parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.file_name, s.file_type, s.file_size_bytes, s.extracted_data::text AS extracted_data_raw, u.language, u.telegram_id, s.chat_id FROM sessions s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE s.id = $1 LIMIT 1

UPDATE sessions SET status = 'completed', analysis_type = 'auto', llm_used = $1, llm_response = convert_from(decode($2, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb, llm_response_time_ms = $3::integer, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4::integer

parameters.text: ={{ $json.language === 'FR' ? '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\nQue souhaitez-vous faire ?' : '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\nWhat would you like to do?' }}
